post.description: This endpoint initiates a new off-ramp transfer. It uses the configured off-ramp provider (e.g., Bridge) to create a transfer and returns deposit instructions for the user.

post.summary: Initiate an off-ramp transfer for a guest
post.description: This endpoint initiates a new off-ramp transfer for a guest user. It uses the configured off-ramp provider (e.g., Bridge) to create a transfer and returns deposit instructions for the user. This is intended for server-to-server use where the user is not authenticated.
This endpoint initiates a new on-ramp transfer (fiat to crypto). It creates a transfer from fiat to USDC on Arbitrum to the user's peanut wallet and returns bank deposit instructions.

delete.description: This endpoint cancels an on-ramp transfer. The transfer must be in AWAITING_FUNDS/PENDING state. It updates the ledger and calls Bridge API to cancel the transfer.

post.summary: Initiate an on-ramp transfer for a guest
post.description: This endpoint initiates a new on-ramp transfer (fiat to crypto) for a guest. It creates a transfer from fiat to USDC on Arbitrum to the guest's peanut wallet and returns bank deposit instructions.
Process a QR payment through Manteca. Supports PIX, QR 3.0, and CODI payments.

qrCode.description: The QR code string to process for payment

amount.description: Amount for static QR codes (optional for dynamic QR codes)

qrType.description: Type of QR code (e.g. PIX, QR30, CODI). Used to select the correct fallback user for non-Manteca users.

post.summary: Complete QR payment with signed transaction
post.description: Completes Manteca payment first, then broadcasts signed UserOp. This prevents funds from being stuck if Manteca fails.

paymentLockCode.description: The payment lock code from init

qrType.description: Type of QR code (e.g. PIX, QR30, CODI). Used to select the correct fallback user for non-Manteca users.

post.description: Create a deposit order to convert fiat to crypto via Manteca. Returns deposit instructions.

patch.description: Cancel a deposit order created via Manteca.

post.description: Creates a price lock for withdraw. Returns the locked exchange rate valid for ~120 seconds. Use this before showing the user the final amount.
Create a withdraw order to convert crypto to fiat via Manteca. Optionally use a pre-locked price from /withdraw/init.

amount.description: Amount to withdraw in crypto asset

priceLockCode.description: Price lock code from /withdraw/init. If not provided, a new price lock is created.

post.description: Creates Manteca ramp-off order FIRST, then broadcasts signed UserOp. This prevents funds from being stuck if Manteca fails.

currency.description: Target fiat currency (must match price lock)

post.description: Handle webhook notifications from Manteca about synthetic status updates
Creates an onboarding widget URL for the current user using userId as userExternalId and returns the URL
User-triggered action to claim USDC sponsorship for an eligible perk

get.description: Returns all PENDING_CLAIM perks for the authenticated user
Returns redirect URL if claimed, or indicates QR is available to claim

post.description: Claim an unclaimed QR code and tie it to your invite link

get.description: Get the authenticated user's card pioneer status and eligibility

post.description: Creates a charge for purchasing Card Pioneer status

email.description: Email. Finds or creates the user.

post.description: Triggers runPollingCycle() on demand — used by the QA harness to observe provider state transitions without waiting for the 5-minute interval.

userId.description: Peanut user_id to associate with this address

post.summary: Run KYC provider submission synchronously for the given user/applicant
post.description: Drives Peanut's submitToProviders(userId, applicantId) synchronously, the same function the Sumsub status-processor calls after GREEN. Used by QA harness to test routing (AR user → Manteca, US user → Bridge) end-to-end.

userId.description: Peanut user_id whose rails to submit

applicantId.description: Sumsub applicant id with approved docs + extracted data

post.summary: Synthesise a Sumsub webhook and run the status-processor
post.description: Invokes processSumsubKycUpdate({ applicantId, externalUserId, reviewAnswer, reviewStatus, source: 'webhook' }) — same entry point as the real /sumsub/webhooks route, minus HMAC. Used by the QA harness to exercise the full Sumsub → routing chain without real webhook delivery.

amount.description: 6-decimal USDC base units; defaults to entire EOA balance

recipientAddress.description: Address that the recipient will withdraw to

intentOrTransferId.description: Either a TransactionIntent.id or a Bridge transfer id.

chainIn.description: Rhino's source-chain enum, e.g. BASE / ARBITRUM / BINANCE

depositor.description: Source-chain wallet that funded the SDA

recipient.description: Destination peanut wallet address on Arbitrum

amountOut.description: Human-unit destination amount after FX + fees
